title: SOQLE
description: SOQLE (pronounced as Soak-al) stands for "Super Optimized, Quality of Life, and Extras". This modpack is a collection of mods, resource packs, datapacks, and shaders for a superb vanilla experience.
body:
SOQLE (pronounced as Soak-al) stands for "Super Optimized, Quality of Life, and Extras". This modpack is a collection of Mods, Resource Packs, Data Packs, and Shaders for a superb vanilla experience.

Ambient Sounds mod is disabled by default but can be enabled if you desire.

Resource Packs are optional. 3D_Items, Blocks, and Fixes_Parity_Gui were made with Vanilla Tweaks. You can alter these existing Resource Packs on the website. https://vanillatweaks.net/

Data Packs are optional. You can find them in the global_packs folder. They were made with Vanilla Tweaks. You can alter the existing Data Packs on the website. https://vanillatweaks.net/

Shaders are optional. If you choose to play without them, and have NVIDIA graphics (GTX 16xx series or newer), the Nvidium mod will kick in and provide a huge performance boost. Learn more about the mod here: https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium

Bobby mod can be customized to fit your PC specs. To learn more about Bobby visit this link: https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby
